title: Medium Slider Ziplock Bags (30pcs, ½ Gallon / 2.25L) – Reusable Freezer Bags for Meal Prep, Food Storage, Sandwich, & Snacks – Leakproof, Heavy Duty, BPA-Free, Resealable Plastic Bags
features: {All-in-One Kitchen Organizer Set}: Stay neat and save space with 50 reusable freezer bags (10 large 1-gallon, 15 medium ½-gallon, 25 small 1-quart) + 50 labels, pen & a ziplock bag holder — everything you need for meal prep and storage.
{Leakproof & Expandable Design}: Each BPA-free PEVA bag features a strong slider seal and anti-leak expandable bottom for upright storage — ideal for soups, fruits, veggies, snacks, and leftovers.
{Reusable & Eco-Friendly}: Replace single-use plastics with our thick, durable, and washable freezer bags. Reduce waste and protect your food and the planet.
{Durable & Versatile}: Designed to handle daily use — perfect for freezer, fridge, pantry, and travel. Store meats, dry foods, or snacks without fear of tears or leaks.
{Writable Labels for Easy Organization}: Includes writable labels and pen for quick content/date marking. Simplify your batch cooking, meal prep, and fridge storage with this reusable food bag set.
description: Reusable Freezer bags, Ziplock bags with heavy duty zipper, writeable area and expandable bottom plus 50 freezer sticker labels, one ziplock bag holder and a pen.
